text: Your comfort zone is a place where you keep yourself in a self-illusion and nothing can grow there but your potentiality can grow only when you can think and grow out of that zone.
author: Rashedur Ryan Rahman

text: But if as you read this book you're saying to yourself: "I'd rather be miserably married than be alone."Well young lady, take out your clown shoes and buckle your seat belt - it's going to be a very bumpy one-woman circus.
author: Osayi Emokpae Lasisi, Impossible Is Stupid

text: Sometimes we can focus so much on nothing that we make it a big something of nothing
author: Ricky Maye, An Emerging Spirituality

text: It’s an already inside outside,The philosophers say it’s the soulBut it’s not the soul: it’s the animal or the man itselfIn its way of existing.
author: Alberto Caeiro, The Collected Poems of Alberto Caeiro

text: Panic, fear, worry, doubt, negativity ... words not recognized by Cosmic Ordering.
author: Stephen Richards, Cosmic Ordering Guide

text: ... [They] took it upon themselves to start the laborious process of cranking up life again, after death has stopped us all in its tracks.
author: Diane Setterfield

text: Take a rain check on poverty with Cosmic Ordering.
author: Stephen Richards, The Cosmic Ordering Service

text: but her mind feels feverish as it races through the crowded hallways of the past
author: Thrity Umrigar, The Space Between Us

text: In such a person, sadness breeds purpose; finding inspiration in the darkness and often times, I believe, they will impress a hell onto their own lives in order to re-create it, that others might suffer the experience from the comfort of their armchairs. - Quote from Her Past's Present.
author: Michael Poeltl

text: We can accept and embrace our pasts as part of the path that shaped who we are now.
author: Amy Leigh Mercree, The Spiritual Girl's Guide to Dating: Your Enlightened Path to Love, Sex, & Soul Mates

text: There’s the impossible and then there’s Cosmic Ordering.
author: Stephen Richards, Cosmic Ordering Guide

text: Everyday gratitude sweetens what appears flavorless and brightens all that appears dim.
author: Amy Leigh Mercree

text: I am thankful to all the souls, I meet in the journey of life.
author: Lailah Gifty Akita, Think Great: Be Great!

text: Connecting our hearts through love yields a nectar so sweet we are forever full.
author: Amy Leigh Mercree

text: To be the only one who knows is lonely. No wonder Solomon, the wisest man, needed 900 concubines.
author: Jarod Kintz, Whenever You're Gone, I'm Here For You

text: Our hearts speak the same language but more importantly our souls share the same voice.
author: Nikki Rowe

text: For a long time things were so bad. Very bad. Dark even when there was light.The only thing that kept the dark back was the Forever Shiny Thing that was her secret...It is a word...the word hangs on a silver chain. The word is HOPE.
author: Dean Koontz, The Darkest Evening of the Year

text: People living deeply have no fear of death.
author: Anais Nin

text: For though, I walk through the valley of shadows of Death, I will never fear. For You are in Me and I know You will never let me Go.
author: Jestoni Revealed

text: Dreams come true if we can pursue them by overcoming the fear of failure.
author: Debasish Mridha

text: If you have made mistakes in life there’s always another chance with Cosmic Ordering.
author: Stephen Richards, Cosmic Ordering Connection

text: Stand up for your conscience. Use light to reveal what is concealed in the darkness. Use truth to fight the lies, and the heart to fight the mind.
author: Suzy Kassem, Rise Up and Salute the Sun: The Writings of Suzy Kassem

text: Fear of God is a beginning of knowledge.The fear lessened on a higher knowledge.Walk with God is on the top of knowledge.
author: Toba Beta, My Ancestor Was an Ancient Astronaut

text: For success, the author must make the reader care about the destiny of the principals, and sustain this anxiety, or suspense, for about 100,000 words.
author: Ken Follett

text: Tension is who you think you should be. Relaxation is who you are.
author: Unknown

text: If you know the power of your thoughts, you would never fear failure.
author: Debasish Mridha

text: What are five things you are grateful for? Right now? Open to gratitude and you will soften into joy.
author: Amy Leigh Mercree

text: Thanksgiving is a joyous invitation to shower the world with love and gratitude.
author: Amy Leigh Mercree

text: Memoria - fie memoria individuală, fie memoria colectivă care este cultura - are o dublă funcție. Una, într-adevăr, e să conserve anumite date, cealaltă să cufunde în uitare informațiile ce nu ne folosesc și care ne-ar putea încărca inutil mințile.
author: Jean-Claude Carrière, Nu sperați că veți scăpa de cărți

text: If you can think about it, you can achieve it. The difference between your thought and achievement are your self-doubt, and fear of failure. The longer you will take to start, the longer you will take to reach your destination. Seeds of everything that we see around were first sown in the mind.
author: Sanjeev Himachali

text: High school will probably be better. I mean, some kids will still be jerks, but it's not so bad if you have at least one good friend. Someone who gets you.
author: Robin Stevenson, The World Without Us

text: His conception of the universe is, however, instinctive, not intellectual; it can't be criticized as a concept, because there’s none there, and it can't be criticized as temperament, because temperament can't be criticized.
author: Álvaro de Campos

text: Time stood still so she learnt to alter her focus.
author: Nikki Rowe

text: The difficulties and challenges in your life are the lessons you need to learn to grow and development.
author: Avis J. Williams

text: How does one kill fear, I wonder? How do you shoot a spectre through the heart, slash off its spectral head, take it by its spectral throat?
author: Joseph Conrad, Lord Jim

text: I shall not dwell in the past...I shall not dread the present...I shall not fear the Future...For as Long as I live...I shall only think of success.
author: Oscar Trejo Jr., Remember Me Tomorrow

text: Friendship needs no words - it is solitude delivered from the anguish of loneliness.
author: Dag Hammarskjold

text: Because that was then and this is now. Because the past is gone, even though it defines the present.
author: Stephen King, Doctor Sleep

text: At the end of almost every AA meeting, someone read the Promises. One of these was 'We will not regret the past nor wish to shut the door on it'. Dan thought he would always regret the past, but he had quit trying to shut the door. Why bother, when it would just come open again? The fucking had no latch, let alone a lock.
author: Stephen King, Doctor Sleep

text: Don’t fear challenges. They often give us the opportunity to strengthen our courage, faith, and inner strength.
author: Debasish Mridha

text: Poetry happens when there is nothing to say but you have a volcano hidden inside you waiting to erupt.
author: Debasish Mridha

text: Never get angry. If you have to get angry, get angry at yourself and not at others.
author: Debasish Mridha

text: There is no stress. It is a misinterpretation of a situation. Just change your perception and stress will melt away.
author: Debasish Mridha

text: Kashays [anger-pride-deceit-greed] will not leave by suppressing them, they go away through Gnan (Enlightened Knowledge).
author: Dada Bhagwan

text: Soul (Atma) remains very far from where kashays (anger-pride-deceit-greed) are created, the Soul is quite far from there. Where there is absence of kashays, there lies the ‘religion of Vitrags (the enlightened ones)’, and where kashays are present, lies the ‘relative religion’!
author: Dada Bhagwan

text: There is no samkit (vision with right belief that I am Pure Soul) where there are kashays [anger, pride, deceit and greed], and where there are no kashays, there is samkit (self realization).
author: Dada Bhagwan

text: Warriors achieve more than worriers.
author: Matshona Dhliwayo

text: Transform from being a fault-finder and blamer to a happiness-finder and appreciator. Positive emotions will increase in your life.
author: Maddy Malhotra, How to Build Self-Esteem and Be Confident: Overcome Fears, Break Habits, Be Successful and Happy

text: It's easy and natural to be thankful when your expectations are met. The real test of your faith is when things don't go your way, or when you are in pain.
author: Maddy Malhotra, How to Build Self-Esteem and Be Confident: Overcome Fears, Break Habits, Be Successful and Happy

text: Gratitude is where every positive attitude starts.
author: Michael Hyatt, Living Forward: A Proven Plan to Stop Drifting and Get the Life You Want

text: When a bumptious person can’t satiate oneself with an empty praise from others, s/he may go a step further to organize a get-together to bring all people of own nature under a single roof to meet, deliberate, celebrate, collaborate, greet, treat , appreciate or even felicitate one another.
author: Anuj Somany

text: Breathe light into your body - breathe light into your Heart - Breathe light into your mind - Breathe and OPEN! Breathe and remember that you are all LIGHT - Infinite LIGHT -Blessed LIGHT- open your heart and SHINE ON!
author: Angie karan

text: Simply just BE GRATEFUL what you have today, there is millions who'are crying for the place where you are today
author: Rashedur Rahman

text: Your life looks like a prison because you focus on the things you wish you had and thus don’t appreciate what you already have.So why don’t you try to see the abundance in your life? Because, if you haven’t noticed, you’ve got many things to thank for. Just look around.
author: Lidiya K., This Moment

text: Be mindful. Be grateful. Be positive. Be true. Be kind.
author: Roy T. Bennett, The Light in the Heart

text: Our daily gratitude shapes our everyday attitude.
author: H.L. Balcomb

text: Your success should create a path that inspires others to follow.
author: Amitav Chowdhury

text: A sign of gratitude is a thankful smile.
author: Debasish Mridha

text: Touch your enemies’ heart with love. It will bloom flowers of gratitude and joy.
author: Debasish Mridha

text: Why do you think that you are weak when you are blessed with the power of love?
author: Debasish Mridha

text: What you conquer within you conquer without.
author: Matshona Dhliwayo

text: Your friends can be double-edged knife thy can either nurture you or destroy you. Choose them Wisely......
author: Abhishek Shukla, The Reflection "Success or Stress"Choose Wisely

text: Beautiful rainbows are formed in ugly storms.
author: Matshona Dhliwayo

text: Excuses; the great chains that entangle purposeful life to the pillar of unpurposeful living
author: Ernest Agyemang Yeboah

text: I can't be afraid of someone whose human side I see and know.
author: Cecelia Ahern, Flawed

text: No amount of regretting can change the past, and no amount of worrying can change the future.
author: Roy T. Bennett, The Light in the Heart

text: Mind and man what is in today and make today the solid foundation for tomorrow. Focus on what tomorrow brings ans let yesterday be yesterday. If there are lessons to learn from yesterday, don’t neglect them and don’t be crippled by the negativity of yesterday; Only use them as the best panacea and antidote to the ‘had I knows’ of tomorrow you are yet to meet!
author: Ernest Agyemang Yeboah

text: Someone who claims to write with emotion recollected in tranquility, is a fool and a liar. To understand is to tremble. To recollect is to re-enter and riven......I admire the authority of being on one's knees in front of an event.
author: Harold Brodkey

text: You become what you focus on and dream about.
author: Debasish Mridha

text: Your past karma is what you found difficult or challenging in this life. To heal your past karma you would need to learn your life lessons for this life.
author: Avis J. Williams

text: Create your own path.Don't blindly follow the massess... because most of the time the "M"is silent.
author: Abhishek Shukla, The Reflection "Success or Stress"Choose Wisely

text: Follow your heart. It will lead you to where you need to be.
author: Avis J. Williams

text: Failure results from lack of focus and half trust. Success results from complete devotion and utmost trust.
author: Debasish Mridha

text: I didnt give up, because i had nothing, i was no body. But for the fact i was no body and i had nothing. It made me work harder to have something and to be someone. I worked harder more than anyone who had anything. It matters how you view or see things.same thing might not look the same . It depend which angle you are looking them from.
author: De philosopher Dj Kyos

text: Give your life purpose and focus. Position yourself to succeed
author: Karon Waddell

text: We can live forever even with an impactful shorter-life.
author: Aniekee Tochukwu Ezekiel, Psychology of Friendship for Leadership

text: She was too well-trained to panic.
author: Steve Sheinkin, Bomb: The Race to Build—and Steal—the World's Most Dangerous Weapon

text: Transform from being a fault-finder and blamer to a happiness-finder and appreciator.
author: Maddy Malhotra, How to Build Self-Esteem and Be Confident: Overcome Fears, Break Habits, Be Successful and Happy

text: I saw that all the things I feared and which feared me had nothing good or bad in them save in so far as the mind was affected by them.
author: Baruch Spinoza, On the Improvement of the Understanding

text: Forgive the past to welcome the future.
author: Debasish Mridha

text: Sometimes you wish the world would be a better place and sometimes you wish the world was a better place. Only the great understanding of the difference of the time between the past and present moment will make it a better place.
author: Jammy Creamer

text: Life happened in the past. Life will happen in the future, but life is happening at this moment. Live in this moment. Seize this moment!
author: Debasish Mridha

text: This is part of the answer to the riddle ofchildhood unhappiness: their minds need, and deserve, a whole world of utterly unfenceable freedom where everything has othering, everything is radiant with the possibilities ofelseness.
author: Jay Griffeths

text: Your past must die for your future to live.
author: Matshona Dhliwayo

text: I intend to live in the beauty of past memories for I know them the best. At this moment, the future is unknown so it will be an adventure for me.
author: Debasish Mridha

text: My heart was in my mouth. I realised that I had no desire to know any more about her past. What was behind her made me feel sick, petrified. Only the future mattered now.
author: Ruth Ahmed, When Ali Met Honour

text: But then what does it matter whence comes the gentle nudge that jars the soul into motion and sets it rolling, doomed never again to stop?
author: Vladimir Nabokov, Glory

text: College was at the heart of his sentimental imagination.
author: Rick Perlstein, The Invisible Bridge: The Fall of Nixon and the Rise of Reagan

text: If someone would have talked in school about safe touch and unsafe touch, I believe I would have spoken up as a child and not been victimized over and over again for years, but that day never came, which is why my mission now is to protect children from the childhood I could not be protected from.
author: Erin Merryn, An Unimaginable Act: Overcoming and Preventing Child Abuse Through Erin's Law

text: Transform, from a fault-finder and blamer to a solution-finder and appreciator.
author: Maddy Malhotra, How to Build Self-Esteem and Be Confident: Overcome Fears, Break Habits, Be Successful and Happy

text: Let us be the wind of love that touches every heart and blows away all of the misery and sadness.
author: Debasish Mridha

text: Sorrow is knowledge: they who know the most must mourn the deepest o’er the fatal truth, the Tree of Knowledge is not that of Life.
author: George Gordon Byron, Manfred: A Dramatic Poem

text: Try your best; forget the rest.
author: Debasish Mridha

text: When people leave you, identify why they left and think about what is left
author: Ernest Agyemang Yeboah

text: Remember that you are never alone—you are always with yourself.
author: Debasish Mridha

text: He touched my soul long before I knew what his hands felt like.
author: Nikki Rowe

text: We often focus on what is wrong and complain that nothing is beautiful.
author: Debasish Mridha
